title: Earthy Midnight Craving Japanese Dates Tofu Dashi
description: A hearty, low-sodium-friendly, Japanese-inspired dish featuring stoned dates and a savory dashi broth. Perfect for a midnight craving.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Soft and silken, drained and cubed

ingredients.name: Green onions
ingredients.notes: Sliced and separate white and green parts

instructions: Combine kombu and 4 cups water in a large pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, or until kombu is tender.
Add shiitake mushrooms and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
In a separate pan, combine ferment-jang, rice vinegar, soy sauce, and ginger. Simmer over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a blender or food processor, puree the dashi broth with the fermented paste mixture until smooth.
In a large serving bowl or mason jar, combine the pureed dashi broth, stoned dates, and cubed tofu.
Garnish with green onions and serve hot.
